message.content:
Do a very thorough exploration of the rich text editor in this codebase. I need to understand every single feature, plugin, node, and toolbar action that currently exists.

Explore these directories and files:
- client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ — ALL files
- Any Lexical-related nodes, plugins, or utilities anywhere in the codebase
- The LexicalComposer setup in App.jsx
- Any CSS files related to the editor

For each file, tell me:
1. What it does
2. What Lexical features/plugins it uses
3. What's missing compared to the Lexical Playground

The Lexical Playground has these features that I need to check against:
- Rich text formatting (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, subscript, superscript, code)
- Block types (paragraph, H1-H6, quote, code block, bullet list, numbered list, check list)
- Text alignment (left, center, right, justify)
- Links (insert/edit/remove)
- Tables (insert, row/column operations)
- Horizontal rule
- Page break
- Inline images with captions
- Drag and drop
- Markdown shortcuts
- Undo/redo
- Find and replace
- Collapsible sections
- Font family/size/color/background color
- Embeds (YouTube, Twitter)
- Excalidraw
- Floating toolbar (for selections)
- Sticky notes

Return the complete list of files found with their paths and a detailed gap analysis.

content.text:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me compile the full gap analysis.

---

Here is the complete file-by-file breakdown and gap analysis for the entire Lexical editor implementation in `iskrib_v3`.

---

## Complete File Inventory

### Core Editor Files

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/Editor.jsx`**

The outer shell/wrapper component. Handles:
- Title input (plain HTML `<input>`, not part of Lexical)
- Close/discard/save-draft confirmation dialog (Framer Motion animated)
- Consumes `useLexicalComposerContext` (lives inside the global `LexicalComposer` from `App.jsx`)
- Tracks `uploadedImagePaths` for cleanup on discard
- Passes state down to `EditorInner` via props
- Auto-focus on the save button when the discard dialog opens
- Escape key dismisses the discard dialog

Lexical APIs used: `useLexicalComposerContext`, `$getRoot`, `editor.update`, `editor.read`, `editor.parseEditorState`, `editor.getEditorState().toJSON()`

---

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/RichTextEditor.jsx`** (`EditorInner`)

The actual Lexical composition layer. Handles:
- `RichTextPlugin` with `ContentEditable` and `LexicalErrorBoundary`
- `HistoryPlugin` — undo/redo via keyboard (Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y) — no toolbar buttons exposed
- `OnChangePlugin` — fires on every state change; serializes to JSON, calculates word count, updates `hasContent` flag
- `ImagePlugin` — registers INSERT_IMAGE_COMMAND
- `MentionPlugin` — @mention autocomplete
- Auto-save every 30 seconds when unsaved changes exist
- Save Draft / Publish buttons in the footer
- Word count display in the footer
- Save status indicator (Saving... / Saved Xm ago / Unsaved changes)
- Bar loader during publish

Lexical plugins used: `RichTextPlugin`, `HistoryPlugin`, `OnChangePlugin`, `LexicalErrorBoundary`

---

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/Toolbar.jsx`** (the active main toolbar)

The primary, fully-featured toolbar. Features:

| Group | Buttons | Implementation |
|---|---|---|
| Image | Insert image from file | `INSERT_IMAGE_COMMAND` dispatch |
| Text format | Bold, Italic, Underline | `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND` |
| Block type | H1, H2, H3, Quote | `$setBlocksType` + `$createHeadingNode` / `$createQuoteNode` |
| Text color | 23-color palette popover | `$patchStyleText` with `color` |
| Highlight | 23-color palette popover | `$patchStyleText` with `background-color` |
| Alignment | Left, Center, Right | `FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND` |

Active-state detection: `editor.registerUpdateListener` reads selection on every change, checks `hasFormat('bold')` etc., `$isHeadingNode`, `$isQuoteNode`, `element.getFormatType()`, `$getSelectionStyleValueForProperty` for color/highlight. Active buttons get an `.is-active` CSS class.

Color picker is a custom-built 23-swatch popover. Normalizes colors between hex and `rgb()` for active-state comparison. Closes on click-outside via a ref.

---

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ToolbarForEdit.jsx`**

A legacy/alternate toolbar used in the older `VisitProfile` / edit journal flow. Has an identical feature set to `Toolbar.jsx` but **without**:
- Color picker (text color / highlight)
- Active state tracking (no visual feedback for current format)
- `onMouseDown` preventDefault protection is less thorough

Renders buttons as an array map rather than individual JSX. **No `addUploadedImagePath` support** — image upload is omitted. This toolbar is imported in `editJournal.jsx` but that file actually imports `Toolbar` not `ToolbarForEdit`, so `ToolbarForEdit` may be dead code at this point.

---

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/editor.css`**

Covers all editor styling:
- Mention node + dropdown
- Text format classes (`editor-text-bold`, `editor-text-italic`, `editor-text-underline`)
- Container, overlay, close button, title input
- Toolbar, groups, dividers, color picker/popover
- Editor shell and content area
- Footer, word count, save status
- Save/Draft buttons
- Image wrapper, actions (rotate/delete), resize handles (NW, NE, SW, SE, N, S, E corners — 7 handles total), dimension display badge, loading overlay, full-screen view
- Discard confirmation dialog
- Mobile responsive overrides at 640px breakpoint

Notable: **No CSS for lists, code blocks, strikethrough, links, tables, or horizontal rules**. The theme mapping in `App.jsx` only defines `paragraph`, `heading.h1-h3`, `quote`, `text.bold/italic/underline`.

---

### Nodes

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/ImageNode.jsx`**

A custom `DecoratorNode`. Features:
- Properties: `src`, `width`, `height`, `loading` (boolean), `rotation` (degrees)
- `exportJSON` / `importJSON` for serialization/deserialization
- `setWidthAndHeight()`, `setRotation()`, `setSrcAndLoading()` mutators
- `decorate()` renders `ResizableImageComponent` in edit mode (or `ImageComponent` in read mode — actually always `ResizableImageComponent`, passing `isEditable` flag)
- Custom command: `INSERT_IMAGE_COMMAND` created with `createCommand`

**Missing from ImageNode**: no `altText`/caption support, no `alignment` property.

---

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/MentionNode.jsx`**

A custom inline `DecoratorNode`. Features:
- Properties: `mentionName`, `mentionUserId`, `mentionUsername`
- `isInline()` returns `true`
- `exportJSON` / `importJSON` for full serialization
- `getTextContent()` returns `@username` (important for plain text extraction / word count)
- `decorate()` renders `MentionComponent`

---

### Components (non-node)

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ResizableImageComponent.jsx`**

The rich image component rendered by ImageNode in editable contexts. Features:
- 7-handle resize system (NW, NE, SW, SE corners + N, S, E sides)
  - Corner handles: proportional resize (maintain aspect ratio)
  - E handle: width only
  - N/S handles: height only
- Mouse and touch event support (`mousemove`/`touchmove`)
- Minimum width/height enforced at 100px
- Rotate button (90-degree increments, wraps at 360)
- Delete button (removes node from editor + calls `deleteJournalImage` API to remove from Supabase storage)
- Loading overlay with spinner (shown while image is uploading)
- Click to select (shows resize handles + dimension badge)
- Click outside to deselect
- View mode: clicking image when `isEditable=false` opens full-screen overlay
- Framer Motion fade-in animation on image mount

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ImageComponent.jsx`**

Simpler, older version of image component. Just renders image + delete button. **May be unused** — ImageNode's `decorate()` always uses `ResizableImageComponent`. Still imported by `CustomImagePlugin` which itself appears unused.

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/MentionComponent.jsx`**

Renders the mention chip. In edit mode: shows chip with editing styles, no navigation. In read mode: chip navigates to the mentioned user's profile via `handleClickProfile`. Uses keyboard accessibility (`role="link"`, `tabIndex`).

---

### Plugins

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/Plugins/ImagePlugin.jsx`**

Registers `INSERT_IMAGE_COMMAND` handler at `COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR`. On command:
- Creates `ImageNode` + inserts at selection or appends to root
- Tracks file path for cleanup (only for non-loading images)

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/Plugins/MentionPlugin.jsx`**

Full @mention autocomplete system:
- Listens for `@` followed by text on every editor update via `registerUpdateListener`
- MENTION_REGEX: `/@([\w-]*)$/` (matches only from collapsed cursor)
- Debounced API search (200ms) via `searchFollowingUsers` — searches only users the current user follows
- Results dropdown rendered via `createPortal` to `document.body`, positioned at cursor using `getBoundingClientRect`
- Keyboard navigation: ArrowUp/Down, Enter/Tab to insert, Escape to close
- Mouse click to insert
- On insert: splits text node at `@query` boundaries, replaces with `MentionNode`, inserts trailing space

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/nodes/Plugins/CustomImagePlugin.jsx`**

Legacy plugin that reads image nodes from `_nodeMap` and renders them as a separate list of `ImageComponent` instances outside the editor flow. **Appears to be dead code** — not imported anywhere in the current codebase and superseded by the `DecoratorNode` approach.

---

### Draft Management

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/DraftList/DraftList.jsx`**

A route-level page (`/home/drafts`). Features:
- Fetches user's drafts via `getDrafts` API, cached with React Query key `['journal-drafts', userId]`
- Clicking a draft calls `GET /journal/:id/content`, then opens the editor via `handleOpenTextEditor` outlet context with `draftId`, `draftContent`, and `initialTitle` pre-loaded
- Delete button per draft (calls `deleteJournal` API)
- Relative time display (m/h/d ago, or date for older)
- Empty state with icon

**`client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/DraftList/DraftList.css`** — styles for the draft list page.

---

### Global LexicalComposer Setup (`client/src/App.jsx`)

```js
const editorConfig = {
  namespace: "MyLexicalEditor",
  theme: {
    paragraph: 'editor-paragraph',
    heading: { h1: 'editor-heading-h1', h2: 'editor-heading-h2', h3: 'editor-heading-h3' },
    quote: 'editor-quote',
    text: { bold: 'editor-text-bold', italic: 'editor-text-italic', underline: 'editor-text-underline' },
  },
  nodes: [ImageNode, HeadingNode, QuoteNode, MentionNode],
  onError(error) { throw error; },
};
```

This single `LexicalComposer` wraps the entire `/home` route tree (`HomeWithEditor`). The editor is a **singleton context** shared across the route — it does not remount when navigating between sub-routes. The `Editor.jsx` component consumes the context from this root composer.

**Installed Lexical packages (from `package.json`)**:
- `lexical: ^0.17.0`
- `@lexical/react: ^0.17.0`
- `@lexical/rich-text: ^0.17.0`
- `@lexical/selection: ^0.17.1`
- `@lexical/utils: ^0.17.0`

**Not installed**: `@lexical/list`, `@lexical/link`, `@lexical/table`, `@lexical/code`, `@lexical/markdown`, `@lexical/overflow`, `@lexical/dragon`, `@lexical/clipboard`, `@lexical/html`

---

### Other Editor Contexts in the Codebase

**`client/src/components/HomePage/postCards/ProfilePostCards/editJournal.jsx`**
- Standalone `LexicalComposer` (namespace `editContent`) for editing existing posts
- Nodes: `HeadingNode`, `ImageNode`, `QuoteNode`, `MentionNode`
- Uses the shared `Toolbar.jsx`, `ImagePlugin`, `MentionPlugin`, `HistoryPlugin`, `OnChangePlugin`
- Initializes from `journalData.content` string

**`client/src/components/Stories/ChapterEditor/ChapterEditor.jsx`**
- Standalone `LexicalComposer` (namespace `ChapterEditor`) — its own instance, not the global one
- Nodes: `ImageNode`, `HeadingNode`, `QuoteNode` (no `MentionNode`)
- Uses the shared `Toolbar.jsx` and `ImagePlugin`
- No `MentionPlugin`
- Auto-save every 30 seconds
- Save + Publish buttons

**`client/src/components/HomePage/ContentViewer/ContentView.jsx`**
- Two read-only `LexicalComposer` instances (one for repost source, one for main content)
- `editable: false`, nodes: `HeadingNode`, `ImageNode`, `QuoteNode`, `MentionNode`
- Only `RichTextPlugin` + `ContentEditable` — no toolbar, no history, no change handler

**`client/src/components/SidebarOpinions/OpinionsEditor.jsx`**
- Plain HTML `<textarea>` — not Lexical at all
- Has its own `useTextareaMention` hook for @mentions in a textarea
- 280 character limit, character counter

---

## Gap Analysis vs. Lexical Playground

### What Exists

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Bold | Yes | `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND` |
| Italic | Yes | `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND` |
| Underline | Yes | `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND` |
| H1, H2, H3 | Yes | `$createHeadingNode` |
| Quote block | Yes | `$createQuoteNode` |
| Text color | Yes | Custom 23-color palette via `$patchStyleText` |
| Background / highlight color | Yes | Custom 23-color palette via `$patchStyleText` |
| Left / Center / Right alignment | Yes | `FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND` |
| Image insert | Yes | Custom `DecoratorNode` + upload to Supabase |
| Image resize | Yes | 7 custom handles, proportional + independent axes |
| Image rotate | Yes | 90-degree steps |
| Image delete | Yes | Removes node + deletes from storage |
| Image full-screen view (read mode) | Yes | Fixed overlay on click |
| @Mention autocomplete | Yes | Custom `DecoratorNode` + portal dropdown |
| Undo/Redo (keyboard only) | Yes | `HistoryPlugin` |
| Word count | Yes | Root text content split by whitespace |
| Auto-save drafts | Yes | 30s debounce, persisted to DB |
| Draft list / resume | Yes | Dedicated `/home/drafts` route |

---

### What is Missing vs. the Lexical Playground

**Text Formatting**

- **Strikethrough** — `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'strikethrough'` not in toolbar; no CSS for `editor-text-strikethrough`
- **Code (inline)** — `FORMAT_TEXT_COMMAND, 'code'` not in toolbar; no CSS
- **Subscript** — not in toolbar
- **Superscript** — not in toolbar

**Block Types**

- **Bullet list** — `@lexical/list` not installed; no `ListNode`/`ListItemNode`; no `ListPlugin`
- **Numbered list** — same as above
- **Check list** — same as above
- **Code block** — no `CodeNode` from `@lexical/code`; no `CodeHighlightNode`
- **H4, H5, H6** — `HeadingNode` supports them but the toolbar only exposes H1–H3

**Text Alignment**

- **Justify** — `FORMAT_ELEMENT_COMMAND, 'justify'` is supported by Lexical but there is no justify button in the toolbar

**Insert Elements**

- **Links** — `@lexical/link` not installed; no `LinkNode`/`AutoLinkNode`; no link plugin or toolbar button
- **Horizontal rule** — no `HorizontalRuleNode` or `INSERT_HORIZONTAL_RULE_COMMAND`
- **Page break** — no `PageBreakNode`
- **Tables** — `@lexical/table` not installed; no `TableNode`, `TableCellNode`, `TableRowNode`
- **Embeds (YouTube, Twitter)** — no embed node or plugin

**Editor Behaviors / UX**

- **Markdown shortcuts** — `@lexical/markdown` not installed; no `MarkdownShortcutPlugin`
- **Floating toolbar on selection** — no selection-triggered floating toolbar (the toolbar is always static at the top)
- **Find and replace** — not implemented
- **Drag and drop for blocks** — no `DraggableBlockPlugin`
- **Collapsible sections** — no `CollapsiblePlugin`

**Undo/Redo toolbar buttons** — `HistoryPlugin` is registered and keyboard shortcuts work (Ctrl+Z/Y), but there are no undo/redo buttons exposed in the toolbar UI

**Typography controls**

- **Font family** — not in toolbar; no `$patchStyleText` for `font-family`
- **Font size** — not in toolbar; no `$patchStyleText` for `font-size`

**Miscellaneous Playground features not present**

- **Inline image captions** — images have no alt text or caption field
- **Sticky notes** — not implemented
- **Excalidraw** — not implemented
- **Emoji picker** — not implemented
- **Special characters** — not implemented
- **Auto-complete / typeahead** — mentions exist, but no generic typeahead node
- **Speech-to-text** — not implemented

---

### Theme Gaps

The global theme object in `App.jsx` maps only 7 CSS classes. Missing theme keys that would be needed when adding new features:

```
text.strikethrough, text.code, text.subscript, text.superscript
list.ul, list.ol, list.listitem, list.nested.listitem, list.checklist, list.listitemChecked, list.listitemUnchecked
code (code block), code.tokenComment, code.tokenFunction, etc. (for syntax highlighting)
link, table, tableCell, tableCellHeader
```

---

### Installed vs. Required Packages Summary

| Package | Installed | Needed for |
|---|---|---|
| `lexical` | Yes (0.17.0) | Core |
| `@lexical/react` | Yes | React bindings |
| `@lexical/rich-text` | Yes | HeadingNode, QuoteNode, RichTextPlugin |
| `@lexical/selection` | Yes | $setBlocksType, $patchStyleText |
| `@lexical/utils` | Yes | $insertNodeToNearestRoot (used in ToolbarForEdit) |
| `@lexical/list` | **No** | BulletList, NumberedList, CheckList |
| `@lexical/link` | **No** | Links, AutoLinks |
| `@lexical/table` | **No** | Tables |
| `@lexical/code` | **No** | Code blocks + syntax highlighting |
| `@lexical/markdown` | **No** | Markdown shortcuts |
